reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Not japanese standards. Old, smells, not 4 stars. Expensive for the quality

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text:
チェックインで、レイクビューの部屋を素泊まりで予約したのを、食事無しだと何か責められているような感覚があった。
部屋では静かに湖の景色を見られると思ったが、８時前から上階で子供が走り回っている音がし出した。少し我慢すれば子供も眠るだろうと思ったが、9時過ぎても走り回っている。さすがに、フロントに電話して返事をもらったが、学生の団体が泊まっており先生に申し出たとのこと。でもその最中もドンドンと響いていた。諦めてラウンジへ降りて行ったら、先生方がお酒を楽しんでいた。子供を見回ったり注意出来ない訳だと思った。夜中の11時半も飛び降りているようなドンドンと音がしていた。
ホテル側も、子供は楽しくて静かに出来ないのは分かっているのだから、その下に一般の客を泊めるのはどうかと思う。湖北でレイクビューのホテルは少ないので、次はどうしようかと思案中。バスがたくさん停まっていたので団体客が多いんでしょうね。
reviews.response:
この度はグランドメルキュール琵琶湖リゾート＆スパにご宿泊いただき誠にありがとうございます。
レイクビューでの静かなご滞在を楽しみにお越しいただいたにもかかわらず、ご期待に添うことができず、残念なお気持ちにさせてしまいましたことを心よりお詫び申し上げます。

まず、チェックイン時の対応につきまして、お食事なしのご予約に対してご不快なお気持ちにさせてしまいましたこと、誠に申し訳ございませんでした。
本来であれば、どのプランでご予約いただいたお客様にも心地よくご到着いただける対応を行うべきところ、配慮に欠ける印象を与えてしまいましたことを真摯に受け止めております。

また、ご滞在中の騒音につきましても、上階の団体のお客様による足音や物音により、ゆっくりお休みいただけなかったこと、重ねて深くお詫び申し上げます。
ご連絡をいただいた後にお声がけを行ったものの、十分な改善に至らず、ご不快な状況が続いてしまいましたことを大変心苦しく思っております。

団体のお客様と一般のお客様のお部屋配置につきましては、より快適にお過ごしいただけるよう、今後の運営上の重要な課題として真摯に受け止めてまいります。
皆さまに安心して琵琶湖の景色と静かな時間をお楽しみいただける環境づくりに努めてまいります。

この度は貴重なお時間を割いて率直なお声をお寄せいただき、誠にありがとうございました。
いただいたご意見を今後の改善へ活かしてまいります。
グランドメルキュール琵琶湖リゾート＆スパ
フロント担当
reviews.room_type: Classic Room with 2 Single beds Lake View

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Breakfast was fine, service was good, location was walkable from the station and the shuttle bus was helpful and on time.  Good for carrying package to the train.   The town was kind of interesting but Hakone much better.  The spa bath was large and spacious.  It is more of a group location than for couples.
reviews.negatives: The unit bathroom was tiny, uncomfortable and the large step down into the room was almost dangerous.   This place is definitely for people who are going to use the hot spring bath on the first floor and not spend much time for the room.  The bath in the room was tiny, and there was barely room to brush your teeth.   The beds were low.  By an error in signing up for the room, I got the "Mountain View" instead of the lake which was a parking lot instead of water view.  The beds were low.   Adequate if you had lots of friends to hangout with outside of the room.

reviews.title: old
reviews.text: this hotel badly need refurnishment . everything is old though spacious . will not return.
reviews.response:
Thank you very much for staying at Grand Mercure Lake Biwa Resort&Spa. We understand that some rooms are quite old but I can assure you we do our best to keep them clean and tidy through daily cleaning so that it doesn't feel outdated. All our staff will continue to work hard to create an even better environment taking into considerations the opinions we receive from our clients. 
Grand Mercure Lake Biwa
Hotel staff
reviews.room_type: Classic Room with 2 Single beds Lake View

reviews.title: Enjoyed the resort overall but do not book the single twin room as it is very small and bathroom is tiny.
reviews.positives: Perfect location to get away from the hustle and bustle of city life. The amenities were great and I especially enjoyed the welcome drinks and snacks and nightcap.
reviews.negatives: I booked a single room as a single traveler and it was incredibly small and unremarkable. The bathroom was ridiculously small and very odd. This room was nothing like the double room my parents enjoyed.

reviews.title: เก่ากว่ารูปมาก ไม่ตรวปก

reviews.title: Average at best, and definitely not worth the price.
reviews.positives: The food at the hotel was just okay.
reviews.negatives: The location was good, and the hotel was fine, however the very small plastic “unit bath” for a hotel of this level, was definitely not god.

reviews.title: Old and tired hotel
reviews.text: We stayed here as there weren't too many other options in this area. The lobby was nice, giving a false impression of how the rooms would be like. Our traditional Japanese room was spacious but really old and the toilet was tiny. The sofas in the room needs a change/deep-cleaning. Just glad we were only there for a night.
reviews.response:
Thank you very much for taking the time to share your feedback following your recent stay with us.

We sincerely apologize that your experience did not meet your expectations, particularly with regard to the condition of your guest room and furnishings. Your comments have been shared with our management team, and we will continue our efforts to improve the comfort and quality of our facilities.

At the same time, we are pleased to know that you appreciated our lobby area. We truly value your constructive feedback, as it helps us to enhance the overall guest experience.

We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you again in the future and provide you with a more pleasant and comfortable stay.
Grand Mercure Lake Biwa
Front Staff
reviews.room_type: Classic Japanese style with 4 Futon Lake View

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: The Onsen facilities are renovated, but the huge number of guests make the changing room quite uncomfortable.  Dining hall and the breakfast were well-arranged.
reviews.negatives: Must be quite an old hotel. The room I got has very run down chairs. Bathroom is small and then the public bath is very crammed.

reviews.title: This hotel is not a good choice for a solo traveler
reviews.text: The hotel has changed owners (and names) several times. The spacious lobby gives the impression of a luxury hotel, but the guest room where I stayed was a bit shabby and needed a makeover. However, the worst aspect (unprecedented in my decades of travel in Japan, staying at over 200 hotels) is that sending luggage via package delivery service (takkyubin, universal in Japan for over 30 years) is handled only by the gift shop and thus impossible when the shop is closed—including all day on Sundays! This is beyond imagination in Japan. The front desk receptionist was unhelpful and belligerent. In the end, I had to take a taxi with my suitcase to a convenience store. It’s possible that  the hotel depends mainly  on large tour groups traveling with their luggage inside the bus, as I observed. In any event, this is not a hotel I would recommend to a solo traveler.
reviews.response:
Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with us. We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you encountered during your stay, particularly regarding the handling of your luggage.Furthermore, we are deeply sorry to hear that your interaction with our front desk staff was unsatisfactory. Providing helpful and courteous service is fundamental, and we will address this issue with our team to ensure better service in the future.
We appreciate your feedback and will consider how we can better cater to all types of guests.
Again, we apologize for the inconvenience you experienced and appreciate your honest feedback. We hope that, despite this experience, you will consider giving us another opportunity to provide you with the service and comfort you deserve. 
Thank you very much for staying with us.
Grand Mercure Lake Biwa
Hotel staff

reviews.title: A great way to relax and be outside for adventures before heading back home after six weeks stay in Japan
reviews.positives: Fabulous location! Great place to take the boat trip out to the island and also a wonderful place to bike ride. Dont hotel provides E bikes.

reviews.title: Did a one night stay here while doing the Lake Biwa trip
reviews.text: Hotel staff is nice, just that the hotel is just too crowded and room is depressing small granted it’s was a booking for one.
reviews.response:
Thank you very much for staying at Grand Mercure Lake Biwa Resort & Spa during your Lake Biwa trip.

We are pleased to hear that you found our hotel staff kind and welcoming. Your warm words are truly appreciated and encouraging to our team.

At the same time, we sincerely apologize that the hotel felt too crowded during your stay and that the room size did not meet your expectations. We understand that comfort and relaxation are important, even for a single-night stay, and we regret that we could not provide a more spacious and relaxing experience for you.

Your valuable feedback will be shared with our team as we continue working to improve the guest experience.

Thank you again for taking the time to share your comments. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you again in the future.
Grand Mercure Lake Biwa
Front Staff
reviews.room_type: Classic Japanese style with 4 Futon Lake View

reviews.title: Great location, stunning views.
reviews.positives: Great location, right on the water, stunning view from our room.  Very comfortable beds, the shuttle to the train station comes in handy.
reviews.negatives: The hotel is looking very tired and could use a refresh.  Carpets are stained, furniture is old.   But is very clean.

reviews.title: I recommend it.
reviews.text: It's been a while since my last visit. The last time there was snow, and this time it was a wonderful cherry blossom season. Prices have gone up, and the breakfast buffet has downgraded a bit, but since the price remains the same, it's acceptable. However, I would like to have raw eggs available. The ham was very good, and my grandchild enjoyed having ham sandwiches. The room had an old smell, and I pictured needing an air purifier. The lounge was a wonderful pleasure as always. A great thing about old hotels is the spaciousness. Since there is a large communal bath, I think it would be nice if they renewed the unit bath, as the shower only makes the toilet and sink difficult to use. However, the cost performance is good, and with Nagahama Castle and the park nearby, it was fantastic to see the sunset sinking beyond the lake from the hotel lounge. I'm sure I will want to go again.
reviews.response:
この度はグランドメルキュール琵琶湖リゾート＆スパに再びご宿泊いただき、誠にありがとうございます。
また、「オススメです」との嬉しいお言葉とともに、丁寧で温かいご感想をお寄せいただき、心より御礼申し上げます。

前回の雪景色に続き、今回は桜の美しい季節にご来館いただけたとのこと、それぞれ異なる魅力をお楽しみいただけたご様子を大変嬉しく拝読いたしました。お孫様がハムサンドを喜ばれていたとのエピソードも、微笑ましく拝見いたしました。

朝食につきましては、貴重なご意見をありがとうございます。
内容に関するご期待に添えなかった点や、生卵のご要望につきましては、今後の参考とさせていただき、よりご満足いただける内容を目指してまいります。

また、お部屋のにおいや設備面に関しましても率直なご意見をお寄せいただき、重ねて御礼申し上げます。
空気清浄機の設置や水回りのリニューアルなど、快適性向上に向けた課題として真摯に受け止め、今後の改善検討に活かしてまいります。

そのような中でも、ラウンジでのひとときや、長浜城や公園、そして湖に沈む夕陽の景色をお楽しみいただけたとのこと、大変光栄でございます。当館ならではのロケーションの魅力をご堪能いただけたこと、何よりでございます。

「きっとまた行く気がします」とのお言葉を励みに、これからもコストパフォーマンスだけでなく、滞在全体の満足度を高められるよう努めてまいります。

ぜひまた季節を変えてお越しいただき、異なる琵琶湖の表情をお楽しみくださいませ。

お客様のまたのお越しを、スタッフ一同心よりお待ち申し上げております。
この度は誠にありがとうございました。
グランドメルキュール琵琶湖リゾート＆スパ
フロント担当

reviews.title: worth the stay.
reviews.positives: The Breakfast buffet was delicious.
reviews.negatives: The hotel a bit old.

reviews.title: 一間湖邊嘅酒店
reviews.text: 位置係琵琶湖邊 景觀一流 價錢合理 附近有一個免費停車場有大概40個位 房間可以揀湖景  室內裝飾比較傳統 空間非常大夠靜 浴室基本配置 設施豐富有大浴場同埋飲嘢打球嘅地方 有巴士接駁市區 較適合駕駛人士 住客大部份為日本人 遊客少 早餐非常豐富 可以在早餐餐廳欣賞琵琶和全景 早上人流多
reviews.response:
感謝您選擇入住 滋贺琵琶湖美爵度假酒店及水疗中心，並細心分享如此詳盡的入住體驗。

很高興您喜歡酒店位於 琵琶湖 湖畔的地理位置，以及開揚一流的景觀。能在湖景相伴下放鬆身心，是我們一直希望為客人帶來的體驗。您提到房間空間寬敞、環境安靜，我們亦感到十分欣慰。

同時，感謝您對酒店設施的肯定，包括大浴場、休閒娛樂空間，以及接駁巴士服務。免費停車場亦為自駕旅客提供更多便利，正如您所說，酒店確實較適合駕駛人士。

早餐方面，很高興您欣賞豐富的餐點選擇，並能在餐廳一邊用餐、一邊飽覽琵琶湖全景。關於早上人流較多的情況，我們會持續優化動線安排與服務流程，讓賓客能更舒適地享用早餐。

再次感謝您的寶貴意見，期待未來有機會再為您服務。
Grand Mercure Lake Biwa
Front Staff
reviews.room_type: Classic Room with 2 Single beds Lake View

reviews.title: A group of us met there for a little reunion, so we were pleased to have a space to talk together.
reviews.positives: I liked the location and the onsen.
reviews.negatives: There was no convenience store close by, so it would have been nice to have a small store or kiosk in the hotel.

reviews.title: The view is great!
reviews.text: The floor wasn't very high, but it was a corner room, and I could see Lake Biwa from both sides, which was very nice! I chose a plan with breakfast, and the buffet had a lot of variety, which was great! The miso katsu burger was soft and delicious! The all-inclusive option and access to the lounge was also nice! However, there were few drink machines at the drink bar, so when maintenance was being done and they were unavailable, it caused some waiting, so I think it would be better if there were a few more. The room was very clean, especially the bathroom area, but there were some hairs on the floor, which detracted slightly from the cleanliness, so that was unfortunate. Overall, I thought it was good. I hope to visit again!
reviews.response:
この度はグランドメルキュール琵琶湖リゾート＆スパにご宿泊いただき、誠にありがとうございます。
角部屋からの琵琶湖の眺望や朝食ビュッフェ、味噌カツバーガーをお楽しみいただけたとのお言葉、大変嬉しく拝読いたしました。

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: When we checked in, the room was very smoky.  The manager was wonderful and moved us to a better room.
reviews.negatives: After checking out, a manager called my cell phone saying we had not paid our bill and I need to return.  I was not nearby and told him I had the cc receipt.  He continued to call and demanded I return, ruining my time at a Buddhist temple with a friend performing a chant.  After all this, it turns out they were wrong but never got to see my friend perform the prayer.

reviews.title: Important Notes for Hotel Stay
reviews.text:
One of the good points about this hotel is that the views are very good, allowing guests to enjoy the scenery from both the guest rooms and common areas. Additionally, the premises are spacious, and even though the facilities are a bit old, they have a charm reminiscent of the Showa era. Furthermore, there are many employees, and their service is very courteous and friendly, which was also impressive. I felt that these aspects contribute to a sense of security and comfort during the stay.

On the other hand, there were a few concerning points as well. First is the breakfast buffet. It often felt very crowded due to the poor flow of traffic. Particularly, the cute display of donuts was eye-catching, but due to its structure, many people were dropping donuts, and I saw instances of them being picked up by hand afterward. Considering hygiene, it might be better to avoid having donuts. Moreover, the buffet menu mainly consisted of lighter items such as donuts, muffins, yogurt, and fruit, which was disappointing as there were few substantial dishes like meat or egg dishes. I would like to see a more balanced menu.

Additionally, I found the arrangement of the breakfast venue to be inconvenient. Especially if you take a seat on the ballroom side, the venue is so large that the distance to the entrance where the food is placed becomes very far, making it cumbersome to move around. I hope for layout improvements that consider the flow of movement, such as placing the food counter in the center of the venue.

Also, there are only three elevators, which leads to heavy congestion, particularly during peak times in the morning and evening when you might be passed over several times, so it is necessary to plan your movements with ample time.

Overall, while there are many good points such as the views, staff responsiveness, and the atmosphere of the premises, there are also several areas that need improvement in this hotel. If you take the above notes into consideration during your stay, you should be able to have a more comfortable experience.
reviews.response:

reviews.title: local “feel” hotel but worth the experience
reviews.positives:
Like: very vintage feel to it, feels like a hotel for locals, which fits my appetite, you get to see what’s in the pack. They try to speak alittle English which I appreciate as compared to other areas. Got to see the lake even tho it was raining the entire day. Met some cool young kids on the way to the hotel too. The whole atmosphere were pleasant , the locals are relax too. Compared to huge cities. 

Dislike: the day I booked I presume they had some festival or event going on, a lot of locals going to the onsen! As usual there’s bound to be Japanese staffs that are hostile towards gaijin and doesn’t want to serve you or acknowledge. Which is fine. I’m paying and they can’t do anything. The rooms seem to be abit old and musky but I’m staying for a day so we can make do with it.

reviews.title: luxurious hotel,
reviews.text:
It was impressive in many ways, so I will write a lot (laughs).

The location is a bit far from the station, which can't be helped, but it faces Lake Biwa, and it's about a 15-minute walk if you cut through a park. However, there is a shuttle bus to Nagahama Station, which is limited in frequency but convenient. The bus takes only about three minutes to the station.

Check-in starts around 1:30 PM, and they provide a card key, but you can only enter your room from 3 PM. There is a spacious lobby area in front of the front desk, and you can enjoy complimentary drinks.

There were already plenty of guests checking in early in the afternoon, sitting and relaxing in the lobby. Next to it, there is also a space for table tennis and light games. During the early afternoon, it's relatively empty, so you can choose and play what you like, but it gets crowded in the evening. There are three table tennis tables, which is a bit surprising, as such spaces are rare in hotels I’ve stayed at before, along with their vastness and hospitality.

The rooms are clean, and although the unit bath isn't large, there is no mold, and there are no problems. However, the sound of flushing the toilet is somewhat loud, and you can hear the sound from the next room.

Being a large hotel, there are many guests staying, and depending on the timing, the large public bath and the elevator can get crowded.

The large public bath is likely least crowded early in the evening; it is spacious with about 20 washing stations, a larger soaking area, and even an outdoor open-air bath. Both men and women enter from the same entrance and take off their slippers; there is a generously sized relaxation area for after bathing, which surprised me. There are several comfortable chairs for lounging, and it is a space to "arrange yourself," where you can freely drink cold water or mango drinks. There is a separate entrance for men and women to enter the bathing area from the opposite corridor. I will say again (laughs) that I've never stayed in a place like that before, and I was amazed; such a large public bath was great.

Another surprise in terms of luxury was the "nightcap" time in the evening. The lobby space in front of the front desk has many sofas and tables, including a chest-height table where you can stand and drink, and alcohol is available for unlimited consumption. It is a time for a tipsy state before going to bed, with various bottles of cocktails and drink dispensers lined up. Plus, peanuts, marble chocolates, and ramune are also available for unlimited snacking. However, beer is excluded; even though there is a server, it is not available for use, and when it starts at 9 PM, all the hotel guests flock to the lobby so much that there is hardly a place to sit. Some guests are in yukata, and you can relax, but right after the start at 9 PM, it feels that crowded. Within an hour, tables will be quite empty, but the nightcap time lasts for two hours, so it's better to enjoy the last hour more; meanwhile, you can leisurely drink and get a little tipsy.

Breakfast is slightly like a reservation system, as you are asked during check-in what time you plan to go. Perhaps to understand the congestion due to many guests, you need to set your intended time in advance. Since a considerable number of people gather for breakfast, the venue is divided into a main area and a sub-area. It is a buffet style, but there is a noticeable difference in the abundance of menus between the main and sub areas (laughs), with the main area having a counter where dishes are prepared in front of you, while the sub area does not have that, so there are items in the main area that are absent in the sub area, but that can't be helped. Depending on the time, the main area can be quite crowded, and it seems challenging to line up and grab side dishes amidst that crowd. Still, those seated in the sub area are connected to the main area, and you can go to the main area to pick up menus. Though both are spacious venues, depending on the timing, tables can be filled up quite a bit. Nevertheless, there is enough capacity so you won't have trouble finding a seat, and there are plenty of side dishes that never run out, as they are constantly replenished, and frankly, you can't eat that much anyway (laughs), so overall, it was quite good.

In summary, it is a "surprising" hotel, a place where you can enjoy a luxurious time, even if it is somewhat pricey.

reviews.title: The room is spacious and nice, but...
reviews.text:
Although the facility was old, it had a hot spring and a shop, allowing me to experience the retro Showa feeling after a long time.

However, one disappointing point was that I arrived before check-in time and went to the front desk to ask if I could leave my luggage. Of the two people at the front desk, one was on the phone and could not assist me, while the other was an older woman who was already attending to another guest in front of me. Instead of helping me, she continued with her task, and while I was standing in front of her, I thought she might not have noticed me. I made eye contact, but without a word of welcome, she glanced at me and returned to her file. After she seemed to finish, she went to assist the guest ahead of me. The person who was on the phone was aware that I was waiting but did not attempt to assist me at all. Just as I thought the older woman might come to help, she interrupted the call being made by the other person, directing them instead.

The person on the phone looked apologetic but couldn't interrupt the older woman's instructions and had to continue with her own work. For the first time in a hotel, seeing two customers in front of me, the older woman prioritized her own task without a single word of apology for making us wait. When I asked about luggage storage, she responded as if it were a bother, saying it was an auto-locker behind the wall, implying that I needed to store it myself (with an attitude and tone suggesting I shouldn't have even asked). 

In that moment, I thought to myself that I would never want to come back to this hotel. Given that the other staff were kind, I feel a certain respect for the front desk staff who left me with such a lasting impression on my first visit.
reviews.response:
この度はグランドメルキュール琵琶湖リゾート＆スパをご利用いただき、誠にありがとうございます。 
今回のご宿泊において、チェックイン前のお手荷物お預かりの際に、フロントスタッフの対応により大変ご不快な思いをおかけしてしまいましたこと、深くお詫び申し上げます。
お客様をお迎えする立場として、第一印象となる接遇の重要性を改めて痛感しております。ご指摘のような対応は、あってはならないことであり、誠に申し訳ございませんでした。
本来であれば、たとえ混雑や業務中であったとしても、お客様への挨拶・お声がけを最優先に行い、安心してお過ごしいただけるご案内をすべきところ、スタッフの意識と配慮が至らず、大切なご旅行の幕開けに水を差す結果となってしまいましたことを、重ねてお詫び申し上げます。
当該スタッフには厳重に指導を行うとともに、今一度全スタッフへの接客マナーの再教育を徹底し、今後このようなことがないよう改善に努めてまいります。
今回のご指摘を真摯に受け止め、スタッフ一人ひとりが初心に立ち返り、お客様に安心と快適さを提供できるホテルを目指してまいります。
貴重なご意見を誠にありがとうございました。

reviews.positives: Breakfast was good

reviews.title: Repeat is under consideration.
reviews.text:
Good points:
- There was no sense of devastation in the restaurant as mentioned in reviews, and delicious food was consistently replenished until the last order. Even though it was a buffet, everything was well managed, with no dried-out fish.
- The affordable price allowed us to enjoy not only meals but also amenities like the large bath and table tennis, providing ample entertainment from morning to night. Additionally, the shared areas (large bath, lobby, restaurant, etc.) were very clean, which was nice.

Bad points:
- The cleaning of the guest rooms was insufficient. There were spider webs in the room, and several pieces of the previous guest's snacks were lying on the floor, making it questionable whether to inform the front desk due to the level of dirtiness. It wasn't just wear-and-tear, which was disappointing. Additionally, despite having a lake view, the window was too dirty to take nice photos.
- It was quite lively. While the opportunity to enjoy affordable meals and the lounge is a benefit, it also attracted a rather boisterous crowd. There were instances of adults shouting in the large bath, and some guests seemed to forget it was a shared space while behaving drunkenly in the lounge. I didn't feel it was suitable for those wanting to relax.

Overall, while I felt the service was good for the price, the negative aspects stood out, and I don't think I would return.

先日はグランドメルキュール琵琶湖リゾート＆スパをご利用いただき、誠にありがとうございます。

さらに、賑やかな雰囲気に関しても、ご不快な思いをさせてしまい申し訳ございません。今後、施設内のマナーに関しての案内を強化し、全てのお客様にとって快適な環境をご提供できるよう日々努力してまいります。

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Big onsen on site.  
Free drinks and snacks at lounge area at night.
reviews.negatives:
The staff at reception tried to pull a fast one on me.  I had booked five rooms for 10 people, but noticed that two rooms were designated for only one occupant each.  Wrote to Booking.com in Feb, 2024 to ask them to rectify, but did not receive any reply.  Meanwhile, I had paid the same price for all 10 rooms.

Reception staff initially insisted that I had to pay extra for the two rooms in order to have double occupancy.  He rejected the note that I had written to Booking.com, saying that that wasn't the hotel's problem.  Suddenly, his colleague whispered something to him, and he then immediately said "only for this time, they would accept the two rooms for double occupancy without imposing additional charges"!  I had paid for all 10 rooms at the same price, and I find it unacceptable for the reception staff to try to pull a fast one, even though they did finally decide not to impose extra charges.

reviews.title: It may be old, but the service is good.
reviews.text:
The age of the place can be felt in some areas, but the services provided were good. In particular, the bar time in the evening and the breakfast buffet were very nice. The bar time was really crowded, making it hard to enjoy, but it seems like it could be fun if you go with friends. The breakfast buffet had a wide variety of items, and everything was delicious.

I wished I could spend more time there, but when there are too many people, it turns into a line, and I ended up giving up on waiting.

I felt that the only downside was that there were too many people.

The bath was nice, but there were some people trying to stay in right up until cleaning time, which seemed to trouble the cleaning staff, and that was unfortunate.

I think it would be good to implement rules that can be followed.

Overall, it is a good hotel.

This is my second visit, and next time I would like to visit on a weekday and relax.
reviews.response:

reviews.title: We truly enjoyed the beauty and tranquility of beautiful Lake Biwa. It was the perfect place for some rest and relaxatio
reviews.positives: Perfect location right on the lake. Our room was well appointed with robes and all amenities and had an incredible view of the lake. We loved the welcome happy hour drinks and snacks and also the nightcap drinks and snacks. We looked forward to them every day.
reviews.negatives: I would recommend providing coffee as an option in the room. It was only tea and a cup of coffee in the morning while enjoying the lake view would have been lovely.

reviews.title: Slow travel
reviews.text: I saw in a video that I could have foie gras for dinner, so I chose the expensive dinner option, but instead, I got bacon! There weren’t good options for dinner, and the Omi beef was just thinly floating. The person grilling burgers was polite to the older guests, but they were silent and unwelcoming to women in their 40s. Aside from that, everything was great; we could play table tennis, the bath was lovely, the lockers had secure management, there was plenty of alcohol available, the room was spacious and clean, and they provided hand towels separately from face towels. There was also a tote bag for taking towels to the hot spring, and water servers were available on every floor, so we could use everything without shortage. I was impressed with the facilities! Breakfast was delicious, and I was satisfied with the variety. The staff member grilling the fried eggs was unfriendly, but the service from the other staff was excellent. If it had been a plan with breakfast included but no dinner, it would have been perfect.

reviews.title: You can enjoy the lounge!
reviews.text: The interior has an old charm, but the rooms are spacious, and having separate toilets and baths was comfortable. The large public bath was also spacious, allowing for a relaxing time. I believe this could be easily improved, so I hope they address it thoroughly.

We had to open the window for a while, which luckily was possible even though the room was on the 17th floor. The bed was slightly uncomfortable for our liking, as it had an old-style spring mattress. We still slept fairly well, but considering the price, it probably was not quite worth it.
reviews.response:
Thank you very much for choosing to stay at our hotel and for taking the time to share your detailed feedback.

We are pleased to hear that you found your stay enjoyable overall. At the same time, we sincerely apologize for the discomfort you experienced upon entering your room. The odor you described is certainly not something we take lightly, and we regret the inconvenience of having to ventilate the room yourself. We will share your comments with our housekeeping and facilities teams to ensure more thorough checks and improved ventilation prior to guest arrival.

Regarding the bed, we appreciate your honest opinion. While we are glad to hear that you were still able to rest reasonably well, we understand that comfort is an important part of the overall value of a stay. Your feedback will be carefully considered as we review future renovations and upgrades.

reviews.title: Hotels are no longer just for resting in a room.
reviews.text:
I stayed in a lake-view room with breakfast included for one night and two days. The scenery was fantastic, and the location was great, being close to both the station and the port. The meals offered a great variety that seemed more fitting for a lunch than breakfast, and there were plenty of vegetables. I was also pleased to see local Omi cuisine presented here and there. My usual unhealthy habits were relieved by the hot springs and the meals. 

The lounge time after the bath had unlimited drinks and snacks prepared, which was perfect. It seemed that each guest was enjoying their time in the lounge more than in their rooms. I couldn’t have alcohol due to a doctor’s order, but I enjoyed my relaxation time without feeling any stress. I vowed that next time, I would definitely eat the Omi burger that I missed out on while I was full and go for some drinks after the bath.

reviews.title: Beautiful and relaxing spa night.
reviews.positives: Public bath was modern and chic. It was quite spacious so even though there were many people, it didn’t feel crowded. The room was Japanese-style, spacious, and had a view of the sea and mountains. Great experience for anyone who wants the “traditional Japanese experience.” Toothbrushes in the room were (partially) made of bamboo, which was also a nice surprise for the environment. There is wifi in the room! Booking says there isn’t wifi, but there is, so that was a pleasant surprise.
reviews.negatives: I opted out of breakfast. Mainly because it was a little on the expensive side. I kind of regret not going for it because the pictures look great.

reviews.negatives: No nos gustó el trato que tuvimos nada más llegar nos atendió una que no fue amable con nosotros. Después tuvimos otros problemas con el tema de la cena. Nos indicaron mal el horario y no pudimos cenar en el alojamiento y nadie se disculpó el segundo día. Cuando fuimos a cenar nos cobraron más de 200 € por cuatro personas buffet de Hotel. No volveríamos a ir básicamente por cómo nos trataron nadie se merece que le traten mal y menos en un Hotel de cuatro estrellas. Además, las las habitaciones difieren mucho de las que ponen las fotografías, están muy viejas anticuadas y con varios desperfectos. Es una pena porque había personal que era muy amable pero otros no tanto y poco profesionales. Además que no hablaban inglés solo la chica que nos ha entendido el primer día que fue muy maleducada eso es intolerable bajo mi punto de vista en un Hotel.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Great stay! The room was clean and comfortable, and the staff were very friendly. Breakfast was delicious with many choices.
reviews.response:
Thank you for your inquiry.
We are also very pleased to read that you were "very satisfied" and "had a wonderful stay."
We sincerely appreciate your comments about the cleanliness and comfort of the room, as well as the staff's service.
We are also pleased to hear that you enjoyed the variety and flavor of the breakfast, which is a great encouragement to our cooking staff.
We will continue to strive to provide you with a comfortable and memorable stay.
All our staff look forward to your visit.
Grand Mercure Lake Biwa Resort & Spa
Front Desk
reviews.room_type: Standard Room with 2 Single beds Lake View

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Que le gars du front desk m'a redonné mes lunettes oubliées à la réception avant que je reparte le même soir.
reviews.negatives: J'ai choisi ma chambre avec la description et aussi LES PHOTOS ! Nous arrivons à l'hôtel qui se trouve reculé de tous services et restaurants, et nous demandons s'il est possible d'avoir une chambre sur le côté du lac Biwa étant donné que notre séjour est justement pour apprécier ce lac majestueux. Eh bien sachez que je n'ai pas resté surpris d'apprendre que les propriétaires sont français; ILS CHARGENT 5 000 YENS EXTRA pour une chambre côté lac. Évidemment, je ne les ai pas payé et j'ai pris une chambre "côté montagne". La chambre... les murs défraîchis, la moquette sale, les matelas qui doivent datés de 1996. Imaginez un matelas pliable qui s'encastre dans un divan-lit. Eh bien, c'est le même genre de matelas. Horrible. Tellement inconfortable que nous avons quitté le même soir pour un autre hôtel. Insultant comme hôtel, vue le prix. Nous avons dormi au 30e étages du Ōtsu Prince Hotel, la veille, avec vue sur le lac. Puis, imaginez-vous donc que c'était le même prix (moyennant un extra pour lll'étage au-dessus du 20e, mais à 2000 yens et NON 5000, Jesus Marie Joseph de miséricorde). Se faire "fister" le porte-feuille, c'est ce que ces proprio français font avec leur hôtel de crado, au Japon. Le nom est Le grand mercure, car l'essayer te fait monter la température du sang dans les veine. Insultant.

reviews.title: Grand Mercure Lake Biwa Resort & Spa
reviews.text: We enjoyed our stay at the hotel. The view of the lake was worth it. It was unclear whether the hotel offered a free shuttle service from Nagahama Station. It's not far, but it's challenging to find and navigate on foot if you're unfamiliar with the area. It is a large hotel with many people staying while we were there. Sometimes, it was challenging to find a calm space for meals, especially when the buffet was always crowded and there were long lines of people everywhere. The Spa seems to be popular, but I didn't think it was anything special. I had a good bath and shower facility in the room, but others may not have had the same.  Despite the craziness of meal times, I would stay there again if I had the chance.
reviews.room_type: Standard Room with 2 Single beds Lake View

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: L'emplacement, le petit déjeuner avec un choix incroyable de mets japonais et autres pour composer un moment selon son appétit...possibilité même de se préparer une glace. Vue sur le lac même si de biais, pas comme sur les photos.
reviews.negatives:
L'hôtel est dans son jus des années 70/80, avec moquette, oreiller en plumes(attention aux allergiques), déco du temps passé. 
Le temps de collation gratuit est une bonne initiative mais à ce moment et comme à 2 autres (piscine et petit déjeuner), on se sent englouti parmi des dizaines et des dizaines de personnes venues "profiter". Un monde fou était présent ces 2 nuits! Tant mieux pour l'hôtel et tant pis pour la tranquillité. Une expérience loin de la tradition.

reviews.title: Complete with just the hotel.
reviews.text: This was my second visit. This time there were fireworks, and while I was relaxing in the night lounge, I lost track of time and hurried into the hot spring. I wish the bath hours were until 12 or 1 o'clock. I stayed in a room with a lake view on the 7th floor, but the facilities were still old, and the washroom was difficult to use. Other than that, the room was spacious and my stay at the hotel was wonderfully fulfilling. I will use this facility again.
reviews.response:
先日はグランドメルキュール琵琶湖リゾート＆スパをご利用いただき、誠にありがとうございます。
花火をご覧いただきながら、夜のラウンジでゆっくりとお過ごしいただけたとのこと、大変嬉しく存じます。
温泉のご利用時間に関しまして、ご不便をおかけし申し訳ございません。お風呂の営業時間についての貴重なご意見をいただきありがとうございます。今後の運営の参考にさせていただきます。また、7階のレイクビューのお部屋に関して、設備の古さや洗面所の使いにくさを感じられた点、改善が必要であることをしっかりと受け止めております。これよりお時間を頂く事となりますが一つ一つ改善に努めて参りたいと存じます。
充実した滞在と感じていただけたこと大変嬉しく拝読させていただきました。
また滋賀県にお越しの際はぜひ当ホテルをご利用いただければ幸いでございます。
お客様のまたのお越しを、スタッフ一同心よりお待ち申し上げております。
貴重なご意見を誠にありがとうございました。

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: La taille de la chambre
reviews.negatives: Ce n'est pas un 5* mais un 3*. Tout est payant même l'eau, pas de nettoyage des chambres si on reste 2 nuits. Il faut vider ses poubelles soi même. Réception type hall de gare.

reviews.title: Stayed 2 nights
reviews.text:
Booked a lake view room but after checking in I was disappointed with the harbor view and mostly a view of the adjacent hotel wing.  The director of operations accommodated my request to move and found another room with a panoramic view of the lake and sunset. I decided to extend my stay to a second night but unfortunately the hotel was full and the second night was in a room with a view of the parking lot.  I checked in on a Friday and waited over 30 minutes to check in. Apparently it’s a popular destination for group tours that arrive on buses for the weekend.

The outdoor onsen bath was smaller than expected but recently renovated and clean. Loved the zen like relaxation lounge with a large mural wall and music with lounge chairs and complimentary vinegar fruit drinks.

The hotel also has complimentary electric pedal assist bikes which I used to bike 30 km to Maibara. 

Although the rooms are dated, considering the customer service and onsen relaxation lounge, I would stay again.
reviews.response:
Thank you for staying with us. 
We apologize for the initial room not meeting your expectations regarding the lake view. We are pleased that our Director of Operations could accommodate your request and provide a room with a panoramic view of the lake and sunset. We regret that we were unable to extend the same room for your second night.

We acknowledge the longer check-in time, especially on busy weekends with group tours arriving by bus, and we apologize for any inconvenience this caused. We appreciate your understanding and patience.

It's wonderful to hear that you enjoyed the recently renovated and clean outdoor onsen bath, as well  relaxation lounge with its large mural wall, relaxing music, lounge chairs, and complimentary vinegar fruit drinks. 
Thank you again for your feedback.
We hope to see you again. 

Grand Mercure Lake Biwa
Hotel staff

reviews.positives: Le styel typiquement japonais avec vu sur le lac. L'emplacement aussi était intéressant, puisqu'à 2 pas du port

reviews.title: Comfortable
reviews.text: There are free water dispensers on each floor, which is convenient. The lounge offers a welcome drink and a nighttime session, both of which are free for guests. In addition to unlimited alcohol, non-alcoholic beer, soft drinks, and coffee, there is a great selection of local snacks, including crispy rice crackers, dango, chocolates, and pasta snacks. This alone is worth the value. The dining area is split into two; one side has a lake view of Lake Biwa while the other side is spacious but does not have a view. It is recommended to arrive early. From the guest rooms, you can see Lake Biwa perfectly. There is also a free game corner where you can enjoy air hockey and table tennis. This is a very good hotel that provides great relaxation for the price.
reviews.response:

reviews.title: Natural hot springs by Lake Biwa
reviews.text: I made a reservation because I liked that it has natural hot springs and an outdoor bath. There is a shuttle bus from Nagahama Station, and it's only about a 10-minute walk to Nagahama Port, which is convenient for the Takashima Island cruise. I thought the variety of drinks in the welcome lounge and the presence of some snacks showed good taste. In the room, there was only green tea and hojicha, and unlike most hotels, there was no black tea or coffee, which was unusual. The washing area of the hot spring was quite spacious, which might be typical for foreign companies. The chairs and showers were clean and easy to use. Overall, I thought it was more geared towards families.

reviews.title: Nice Lake view
reviews.text:
This hotel is very near Lake Biwa, nice view from hotel room but a little far from station, 10 mins to reach depending on walk speed.  Perhaps is very cold too 🙂 i love the park there which i can see many maple trees n leaves on floor is so scenic!

They offered free flow of house beers n wines at night for two hours, free onsen for guests, table tennis tables and carom to play. 

My suggestion to stay in hikone instead of Nagahama 🥰
reviews.response:
Thank you for sharing your recent experience at our hotel near Lake Biwa. We're thrilled to hear that you enjoyed the beautiful view from your room and found the park with maple trees and scenic autumn leaves to be a highlight of your stay.

We're glad you took advantage of the complimentary offerings, including the free-flow house beers and wines, onsen access, and recreational activities like table tennis and carom. It's wonderful to know these amenities added to your overall enjoyment.

We appreciate your note about the hotel's distance from the station.
We hope to welcome you back for another memorable stay in the future.

Grand Mercure Lake Biwa
Front Staff

reviews.title: Number of breakfast items
reviews.text: This is my first trip to Shiga Prefecture with my child. The staff were very kind. Being on the 9th floor, the view was great. For dinner, we ate at a nearby skewers restaurant. The grilled chicken was delicious. Breakfast was in a restaurant on the 2nd floor. I was surprised when I got there! It was a buffet, and the variety was so abundant! I filled my stomach with this and that. The recommended dish is miso soup. My usual breakfast at home is bread, but when I tried the miso soup, it was so tasty that I ended up getting a second helping. Thank you for the meal!

reviews.title: Traveling with children
reviews.text:
We stayed at a lodge on the day we went to play in the snow at Oi Buki. Right after checking in, we were served welcome drinks and sweets, with a wide variety that made the children very happy.

The dining area had a location with Lake Biwa spread out right in front, allowing us to enjoy our meal while taking in the scenery, and we had a very luxurious time. The children especially loved the many types of donuts available, and they went back for seconds multiple times.

The hot spring had both indoor and outdoor baths, and we were able to relax comfortably in both. There was also a drink service in the bath area, which showed thoughtful attention to detail.

The kids liked the lodge so much that they said they wanted to stay there again, making it a wonderful memory for our family.
reviews.response:
この度はグランドメルキュール琵琶湖リゾート＆スパをご利用いただき、誠にありがとうございます。 
チェックイン後のウェルカムドリンクやお菓子のサービスをお子さまたちにお喜びいただけたとのこと、スタッフ一同笑顔で拝読いたしました。
ドーナツを何度もおかわりしてくださったご様子が目に浮かび、私どもまで温かい気持ちになりました。

また、琵琶湖を目の前に望むレストランでのひとときや、内風呂・露天風呂でのご入浴もご満喫いただけたようで何よりでございます。
お風呂上がりのドリンクサービスにつきましても、お気づきいただきありがとうございます。
細やかな部分までお言葉を頂戴し、大変励みになります。

「また同じところに泊まりたい」とのお子さまたちのお言葉は、私どもにとって最高の褒め言葉でございます。
これからもご家族皆さまの大切な思い出づくりのお手伝いができますよう、より一層努めてまいります。
お客様のまたのお越しを、スタッフ一同心よりお待ちしております。 
貴重なご意見を誠にありがとうございました。

reviews.title: Excellent

reviews.negatives: Les repas sous forme de buffet sont assez cher. J'ai préféré prendre mes repas en ville.

Thank you very much for staying with us and for taking the time to share your kind review.

We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed the beautiful views of Lake Biwa and found our spa relaxing. It is wonderful to know that you were able to rest and unwind while taking in the scenery, as providing a peaceful and refreshing stay is one of our main goals.

Thank you again for your valuable feedback. We truly appreciate your visit and look forward to welcoming you back whenever your travels bring you to the Lake Biwa area.
Grand Mercure Lake Biwa

reviews.room_type: Classic Room with 2 Single beds Mount View

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Bel emplacement et belles prestations.

reviews.title: Everything is excellent except for the bedding!
reviews.text: The hotel is a bit far from the JR station, about a 15-minute walk. There is a shuttle bus, but it has time restrictions. The hotel facilities are quite old-fashioned, but the cleanliness is very good. It's located by Lake Biwa, and most rooms offer a great view of the lake. The scenery is amazing, and the breakfast buffet is very abundant! The large bathhouse has both indoor and outdoor hot springs, which is a fantastic experience! The only downside is that the bedding is inadequate; the pillows are extremely uncomfortable! They are too soft and too low, and the bed is also soft and saggy, so I didn't sleep well at night. However, the cost-performance ratio of the hotel is still very high! I suggest the hotel pay attention to the bedding and replace the pillows!
reviews.response:
感谢您选择入住本酒店，并抽出宝贵时间分享您的住宿体验。

很高兴听到您对琵琶湖美景、大浴场以及丰富的自助早餐感到满意，同时对酒店的清洁和卫生工作给予肯定，我们深感欣慰，也会将此作为鼓励继续提升服务质量。

同时，对于床品和枕头的舒适度未能达到您的期望，我们深表歉意。您提出的宝贵意见，我们会认真考虑，并在今后的改进中予以重视，力求为每位客人提供更加舒适的睡眠体验。

再次感谢您的反馈，我们期待未来能再次欢迎您的光临，为您带来更加愉快舒适的入住体验。
Grand Mercure Lake Biwa
Front Staff

reviews.title: The staff is friendly and the location is great!
reviews.text: I wanted to take a stroll toward the north of Nagahama, so before checking in, I used a dedicated locker to store my luggage and borrowed a bicycle. It was on a first-come, first-served basis, but I was lucky enough to get one and enjoyed cycling around the Kunitomo Gun Museum and the surrounding area. The facilities were a bit old, but the attentive service made up for it. However, the buffet and lounge service were extremely crowded, making it difficult to relax. Nonetheless, considering the accommodation cost, I would say it's a hotel with great cost performance. I would like to visit again during my next trip around Lake Biwa.

reviews.title: The spa is good.
reviews.text: The shared areas are spacious, and right in front of you, you can take a walk by Lake Biwa while enjoying beautiful sunsets. It's a pity that the spa, which is a highlight, closes at 11 PM. There were also families enjoying table tennis and board games, and the lounge's free access was nice. There are carts for carrying luggage and a coin laundry, making it easy to live comfortably once you get used to it. However, it can get crowded, with many inbound guests. I found it frustrating that the restaurant and elevators were also crowded. We always choose not to have meals included and eat in our room, but the table is a bit too small for that. The window only opens 10 cm, so just a little breeze from Lake Biwa comes into the room, but it's still nice to be able to open it. The cleaning of the magazine articles was not thorough, so I ended up cleaning it myself.

reviews.room_type: Classic Room with 2 Single beds Lake View

reviews.title: Wir haben versucht, aus dem, was wir vorfanden, das Beste zu machen.
reviews.positives:
Das Hotel liegt diekt am Biwako. Vom Hotel aus blickt man auf den größten Binnensee Japans. An das Hotel schließt sich der Nagahama- Schlosspark an. Am Ende befindet sich das Schloss. Die Lage ist also sehr schön. Wenn man gut zu Fuß ist, dann erreicht man in 10 Min. den Bahnhof von Nagahama. 
Das Hotel verfügt über zwei riesige Essensäle, einen Onsen für Männer und einen für Frauen sowie einen Einkaufsladen.
reviews.negatives:
Das Hotel hat 362 Betten in unterschiedlichster Kategorie. Dies reicht von Familiensuiten über normale Doppel und Twinbett- Zimmer bis hin zu Zimmern im japanischen Stil. So wohnen zwischen 700 bis 800 Menschen im Hotel. Sowohl die Lobby, als auch die Restaurants haben einen gewissen Bahnhofscharakter. Es ist extrem laut. Der Lärmpegel beim Frühstück ist kaum auszuhalten. Das Frühstücksangebot ist vielfältig, allerderdings in mancher Hinsicht auch gewöhnungsbedürftig. Was zum Problem werden kann, wenn es um die Klärung von Schwierigkeiten geht, sind die mangenden Sprachkenntnisse in Englisch, des Hotelpersonals. Zum Glück gab es teilweise unter den fünf Beschäftigten am Empfang, einen, der sehr gut Englisch sprachen. Leider waren die nicht immer verfügbar. Den Onsen habe ich aufgrund der Masse an Gästen nicht aufgesucht. Dieser Ort sollte eine Stätte der Ruhe sein, aber ein kleiner Blick in die Anlage zeigte mir, dass es eher wie in einem überfüllten Schwimmbad zuging.
Gerade in den Morgenstunden muss man aufgrund der Fülle an Gästen lange auf den Fahrstuhl warten. Check out ist bis 10 Uhr, da kollidiert man mit den ganzen Gästen, die vom Frühstück zurückkommen. Die Masse an Menschen hat mir sehr zu schaffen gemacht. Es war nicht wirklich erholsam.

reviews.title: We enjoyed our stay!
reviews.text: It was a pleasant stay at this hotel. It was clean, staff are friendly and most importantly, it was kid friendly. My children enjoyed the snacks and the recreation area. We would definitely be back to this hotel again!
reviews.response:
Thank you very much for using Grand Mercure Lake Biwa Resort & Spa the other day.
We are very honored to hear that you enjoyed your stay and that you will definitely return.
We are also very happy to hear that your children enjoyed the recreation area and snacks.
We will continue to strive to improve our services so that we can provide a comfortable stay for families.
We look forward to welcoming you again.
Thank you very much for your valuable feedback.
Grand Mercure Lake Biwa Resort & Spa
Front Desk

reviews.positives: Die Lage war super.
reviews.negatives:
Wir wollten 3 Tage am Pool entspannen, doch dieser war geschlossen, da kein Sommer war. Es waren 28 Grad, top Wetter. Es war Wasser im Pool, Blätter wurden entfernt, aber man durfte nicht hin. Ansonsten gab es auch keine Liegen, obwohl es eine riesige Gartenfläche gab.
Sommer ist im Juli/August!!!

reviews.title: Very good hotel
reviews.text:
I did Biwaichi, a cycling tour around lake Biwa. This hotel is located located directly at the cycling road. It has a beautiful onsen and a fantastic breakfast buffet. All you need to recharge for a long ride. 
It was already my 2nd stay.
However,  the single room I got was a little bit old. Anyway, it was clean and the price was reasonable for golden week in Japan.
reviews.response:
Thank you very much for staying at Grand Mercure Lake Biwa Resort & Spa.

We are delighted that you chose our hotel during your Biwaichi cycling trip and that this was already your second stay with us.
We are very pleased to hear that our location along the cycling road, as well as the hot spring and breakfast buffet, helped you relax and recover after your long ride.

On the other hand, we sincerely apologize that the facilities in your single room felt somewhat outdated and did not fully meet your expectations.
Nevertheless, we truly appreciate your kind comments regarding the cleanliness of the room and the reasonable pricing during Japan’s Golden Week holiday period.

We will continue striving to provide a comfortable and welcoming base for guests traveling around Lake Biwa, including cyclists and other travelers alike.

All of our staff sincerely look forward to welcoming you again.
Thank you very much for your valuable feedback.

Front Desk Team
Grand Mercure Lake Biwa Resort & S

reviews.title: affordable luxury!
reviews.text:
stayed here during my biketouring trip around japan. got it for a relatively cheap price.

beautiful location, excellent facilities. bicycle parking. sunset view.

onsen is great after a long day of cycling.

lounge in the afternoon and evening. free flow drinks, alcohol and snacks for socials (you can go alone as well)

didnt try the breakfast and dinner, would recommend it because there isnt much around to eat.

rooms were pretty basic for me, but im not too fussy about that.
reviews.response:
Thank you very much for staying at Grand Mercure Lake Biwa Resort & Spa, and for sharing your wonderful review.

We are delighted to hear that you chose our hotel during your bike touring trip around Japan and that you found great value in your stay. It is truly a pleasure to know that you enjoyed our location, facilities, bicycle parking, and especially the beautiful sunset views over Lake Biwa.

We are also pleased that you were able to relax in our onsen after a long day of cycling, and that you enjoyed the lounge with its free-flow drinks, alcohol, and snacks. It is wonderful to hear that it served as a comfortable space for both socializing and personal relaxation.

Although you did not have the chance to try our breakfast and dinner, we appreciate your kind recommendation. We hope you will have the opportunity to enjoy them on your next visit.

Thank you as well for your feedback regarding the room. We will continue working to enhance the overall comfort and experience for our gu
reviews.room_type: Classic Single Mount View

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Super Ausblick und tolle Lage für die Anreise per Bahn und Auto. Nachmittags und abends gab es Snacks und Getränke inklusive. Gute Info am Eingang. Transfer zum Bahnhof. Super, großes Zimmer.
reviews.negatives: Altes, abgenutztes Mobiliar. Teppich mit Flecken. Unbequeme Couch. Kein Zimmer um sich dort wohl zu fühlen.

reviews.title: Value-for-money resort
reviews.text: The room is old but spacious and has a fantastic view. The hot springs have been renovated and are beautiful and clean. If you stay in the summer, you can also use the swimming pool. A drawback is that there are no convenience stores nearby. There is nothing to enjoy if you go out lightly at night.
reviews.response:
이번에 그랜드 머큐어 비와코 리조트 & 스파를 이용해 주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다. 또한 소중한 후기를 남겨주셔서 깊이 감사드립니다.

객실에 대해 다소 오래된 부분이 있음에도 불구하고, 넓은 공간과 아름다운 호수 전망을 높이 평가해 주셔서 매우 기쁘게 생각합니다. 더불어 온천 시설의 리노베이션으로 쾌적하고 깨끗하게 이용하셨다는 말씀도 큰 격려가 됩니다. 여름철에는 수영장도 함께 즐기실 수 있어 더욱 다양한 휴식을 제공해 드릴 수 있기를 기대하고 있습니다.

한편, 주변에 편의시설이 부족하여 불편을 드린 점에 대해서는 죄송스럽게 생각합니다. 입지적인 특성상 즉각적인 개선은 어려운 부분이 있으나, 고객님께서 보다 편리하게 이용하실 수 있도록 안내 및 서비스 보완에 힘쓰겠습니다.

앞으로도 더욱 만족스러운 숙박 경험을 제공해 드릴 수 있도록 노력하겠습니다.
다시 한 번 소중한 의견에 감사드리며, 다음에 또 모실 수 있기를 진심으로 기대하겠습니다. 감사합니다.
Grand Mercure Lake Biwa
Front Staff

reviews.title: High CP value hot spring hotel
reviews.text: This is a hot spring resort that features both indoor and a quite large outdoor hot spring, along with a very comfortable lounge area. In the evening, there is a self-service bar offering a variety of alcoholic beverages accompanied by snacks. It is very suitable for those traveling by car, as there is ample parking space. Bicycles are also available for rent, along with electric scooters, making it very convenient to explore Lake Biwa. Additionally, there is a game room where you can engage in some simple recreational activities with children or family.
reviews.response:
非常感謝您選擇入住我們的琵琶湖溫泉度假酒店，並分享您的寶貴住宿體驗。
很高興聽到您對我們的室內與室外溫泉、大浴場休息區以及自助酒吧的服務感到滿意，並享受各式酒精飲品與小食。
同時，我們也很高興您認為酒店便利於自駕遊，充足的停車位以及單車和電動滑板車的租借服務，使您能輕鬆遊覽琵琶湖周邊景點。
此外，遊戲室提供的康樂活動能讓您與家人或小朋友共度愉快時光，我們也深感欣慰。

我們將持續努力，為每位來訪的賓客提供舒適且便利的住宿體驗，期待未來能再次歡迎您的光臨。
Grand Mercure Lake Biwa
Front Staff

reviews.title: 二度と行きたくないホテル
reviews.positives: 新しい施設で設備が清潔だった。良かったのは、ただそれだけ。
reviews.negatives: 全てのスタッフが最悪だった。チェックイン時のフロントスタッフは疲れているのか終始不機嫌。食事の際の入口担当者もイライラして言動が粗雑。ホール担当者も取り扱いが投げやりでいい加減だった。コックも給仕しながらの私語などホテル側の教育が最悪だった。大型ホテルで客の多さに従業員が足りてない経営者側の問題が垣間見える。

reviews.title: Great cost performance!
reviews.text: I stayed on a plan without meals (one night on a Sunday). Since I used the shuttle bus for both arrival and departure, access was sufficient. Whether in the evening or at night, I could enjoy plenty of alcohol in the lounge, so I think people who drink will be quite happy. Although the room was a bit old, it was well cleaned. The bath was spacious, and it didn't feel cramped. There are supermarkets and the Kurokabe Square shopping district near Nagahama Station, so I don't think there will be any trouble procuring groceries.
reviews.response:
この度はグランドメルキュール琵琶湖リゾート＆スパにご宿泊いただき、誠にありがとうございます。
ご滞在中はラウンジでのフリードリンクや館内設備をご満喫いただけたようで大変嬉しく存じます。また、お部屋の清掃や温泉の混雑状況についてもご満足いただけたとのこと、スタッフ一同励みとなります。
周辺の観光や商店街でのご滞在もお楽しみいただけたようで、長浜の魅力を感じていただけたことを大変嬉しく拝読いたしました。

また季節を変えてのお越しもぜひお待ちしております。
今後ともより良い滞在をご提供できるよう努めてまいります。貴重なご投稿、誠にありがとうございました。
グランドメルキュール琵琶湖リゾート＆スパ

reviews.title: Great resort hotel but seems understaffed
reviews.text: We booked tatami room which was a great way to experience a traditional Japanese stay. The free flow drinks and snacks was a big plus as well as the onsen on-site. Perfect for warming up during winter. Breakfast was excellent too. The hotel seemed understaffed though with nobody welcoming guests at the door and the service attitude was lukewarm. Nothing bad but not the usual Japanese hospitality we are used to. Still would recommend.

reviews.title: Awesome lake biwa view
reviews.text:
It was a nice place with everything you need to have a comfy stay. The room provides a beautiful view of lake biwa and most activities of Nagahama are within 10 mins from the hotel. 

Lession learn: There is a shuttle bus at the Nagahama station that goes to the hotel I think it ends at 1700 local time. If u miss the bus you can walk via the Nagahama castle park to the hotel along the parameters of the castle to the hotel, many of the other paths are rocky, bad with luggage. The path google maps recommended was rocky haha. 

The only complaint that I have is that I think the room is quite dusty could be because the ventilation could be broken, tried to change the wind speed but doesn't seem to affect the air coming out of the ventilation. It was not too hot though as it was the beginning of winter when I stayed.
reviews.response:
Thank you for choosing to stay with us and for taking the time to share your detailed feedback.
We’re delighted to hear that you enjoyed the beautiful view of Lake Biwa from your room and found our location convenient for exploring Nagahama’s attractions. It’s also great that you discovered the shuttle bus service and found an alternative scenic route through Nagahama Castle Park when the shuttle was unavailable—though we’re sorry to hear about the challenges posed by the rocky paths. Your tip will surely be helpful for future guests!
We sincerely apologize for the dustiness in your room, which may have impacted your comfort. Cleanliness is a top priority, and we’ll investigate the ventilation system and ensure our housekeeping standards are maintained to avoid this in the future.
We truly appreciate your constructive feedback and hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back for an even more enjoyable and comfortable stay.
Grand Mercure Lake Biwa
Front Staff

「ご不便はなかったですか。」と聞いてくれたので安心しました。

reviews.title: Cost performance: Good
reviews.text:
We went for a one-night stay from Saturday. Despite it being the weekend, the rates were reasonable, and additionally, the welcome drink was not just one free drink but all-you-can-drink. At night, both alcoholic and soft drinks, as well as snacks, were also available for unlimited consumption.

Since it was Saturday, there were a lot of people for the all-you-can-drink starting from 9 PM, but I was satisfied with the price. If you want to drink slowly, it might be a bit crowded, though.

reviews.positives: なし
reviews.negatives:
シーズン時期ということもあり、ビュッフェなど大変混雑していましたが、どこから、並んでいいのかなどの、誘導もなく宿泊者は料理にひたすら群がるようなものでした。
そして、個人的にはさほど料理も美味しくなかったです。

チェックイン時にプールの利用開始時間を決めるのですが、決めた時間に行ってもプールは開いておらず
旅行の予定がくるい、貴重な時間がなくなりました！
あと、開始1番に行ったがプールが汚くゴミやビニール袋、枯れ葉など放置されている
監視員の仕事の範疇なのかは分かりませんが、特に清掃する様子もない

あと、これは個人的な感想ですがリゾートスパと名乗っているが浴場がしょうもなさすぎる。
あと閉まるのが早すぎる。
せめて、深夜の1時　2時くらいは空けておいてほしい
そして、ラウンジもあるが閉まるのが早すぎて、ラウンジの意味がない。
子供連れで、子供を寝かしつけて父と母が交代で浴場とラウンジに行くには閉まるのが早く、ラウンジ料などが、料金に含まれているとあるが利用できずなんの意味もない。

We are delighted to hear that you appreciated the high standard of cleanliness, which is characteristic of hospitality in Japan.
We are also pleased to know that you were satisfied with the spaciousness of your room.

On the other hand, thank you for sharing your valuable feedback regarding the age and condition of the guest room facilities and interior.
We sincerely take your comments into consideration as we continue to improve and refresh our accommodations in the future.

reviews.title: Hotels with good locations and many services for travelers.
reviews.text: This hotel is conveniently located next to Nagahama Castle, Nagahama Station, and Kurokabe Square, making it great for sightseeing on foot. Moreover, drinks and snacks, including alcoholic beverages, are provided for free from 9 PM to 11 PM, which was wonderful. I had a great time enjoying free snacks, wine, sake, and whiskey at the bar late into the night. It was so good that I couldn't believe it was a complimentary service.
reviews.response:
이번에 그랜드 머큐어 비와코 리조트 & 스파를 이용해 주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다.
나가하마성, 나가하마역, 구로카베 스퀘어로의 접근성이 좋다는 점에 대해 만족하신 것으로 보여 매우 기쁘게 생각합니다.
주변 관광을 편안하게 즐기신 것 같아 무엇보다 다행입니다.

또한 라운지에서 제공되는 음료와 스낵 서비스에 대해 칭찬의 말씀을 주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다.
라운지에서의 시간을 여유롭게 즐기시며 좋은 시간을 보내신 점, 매우 기쁘게 생각합니다.

“무료 서비스라고 믿기지 않을 만큼 충실하다”는 말씀을 격려로 삼아, 앞으로도 더욱 만족스러운 서비스를 제공할 수 있도록 노력하겠습니다.
고객님의 다시 방문을 직원 일동 진심으로 기다리고 있겠습니다.

소중한 의견을 주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다.
그랜드 머큐어 비와코 리조트 & 스파
프런트 담당

reviews.positives:

reviews.negatives:
ドリンクを売りにしているが、お酒以外のドリンクがほぼない（ファミレスと同じかそれ以下）。

reviews.title: The best! This is definitely the place!
reviews.text:
The room has a view of the castle and Lake Biwa right in front, with a separate toilet and bathroom. The shower is also outside the bath, making it very convenient. The air purifier continues to operate even when you step out of the room, so it feels nice to return from outside. Although it's shared, the presence of a water dispenser is also helpful.

The variety and quality of the breakfast dishes are top-notch! You can enjoy your meal while looking at Lake Biwa. The large public bath, the ambiance of the lounge, and the drinks provided are all excellent (the sweet rice wine at night was delicious). While there are set hours for use, drinks and snacks are available in the lounge in front of the reception, allowing for casual eating, drinking, and chatting. There's also a game corner with table tennis and air hockey, which is free to use without reservation! Even with many users, everyone adhered to the rule of switching every 15 minutes, allowing for enjoyable use. If you are going to Shiga Prefecture, I absolutely think this should be your place to stay! I want to go again; it was a wonderful hotel.
reviews.response:
この度はグランドメルキュール琵琶湖リゾート＆スパにご宿泊いただき、誠にありがとうございます。

また、「最高！絶対ここがいい！」との大変嬉しいお言葉を頂戴し、スタッフ一同感激しながら拝読いたしました。
数々の温かいご感想をお寄せいただき、心より御礼申し上げます。

お部屋からの琵琶湖や長浜城の眺望、バスルームの使い勝手、空気清浄機やウォーターサーバーなどの設備面につきましてもご満足いただけたご様子に、大変嬉しく存じます。
快適にお過ごしいただけたことが何よりでございます。

また、ご朝食の内容やレストランからの景色、大浴場やラウンジの雰囲気、甘酒をはじめとしたお飲み物など、館内のさまざまなサービスを存分にお楽しみいただけたこと、スタッフにとって大きな励みとなります。フロント前ラウンジでのひとときや、卓球・エアホッケーなどのゲームコーナーも皆様でルールを守りながら気持ちよくご利用いただけたとのこと、大変嬉しく拝読させていただきました。

「滋賀県内に行くなら絶対ここ」とのお言葉、そして「また行きたい」と感じていただけたことは、私どもにとって何よりの喜びでございます。

今後も皆様に心からご満足いただけるご滞在を提供できますよう、より一層努めてまいります。
ぜひまた季節を変えて、琵琶湖の異なる表情とともにお楽しみいただけますと幸いです。

お客様のまたのお越しを、スタッフ一同心よりお待ち申し上げております。
この度は誠にありがとうございました。
グランドメルキュール琵琶湖リゾート＆スパ
フロント担当

reviews.title: もう二度と行くもんか！
reviews.positives: 朝食は内容も豊富で美味しかったと思います。
reviews.negatives:
当日は夏休みということもあって子供連れの家族でごった返していたこともあると思いますが、それを考慮してもなお、気になる点が多々ありました。以下、書きます。
1.　チェックインの手続きの時間がかかりすぎる。受付のスタッフの動作も緩慢で、客を待たせていることに何の問題も感じていない風でした。
2.　館内の利用の仕方については、A4の用紙両面に書いてあるものを読め、という感じで受付での丁寧な説明は一切ない。高齢者には「ウェルカムラウンジ」って言っても何のことやらさっぱりわからない。その場に行ってスタッフに聞いてやっとわかった次第。水陸両用の車で琵琶湖周遊の乗り物についても、どうすればよいのかわからなかったが、入り口の看板を読んで初めて理解できたが、ことほど左様に「すべて書いてあるから読んでね」といった姿勢。全く不愉快。
3.　部屋は北向きで「マウンテンビュー」といったしゃれた表現を使っていたが、何のことは無い琵琶湖が見えない、街並みが見えるだけの部屋だった。それなら申し込み（ネット）の時点で「琵琶湖は見えませんよ」と伝えるべき。支払った料金（52,000円）はコスパ的にはあまり低く、がっかり。
4.　室内のユニットバスへの入り口の段差が20センチぐらいあり、腰の悪い私には出入りが不自由で使い勝手が悪い事この上ない。室内の空調の使い方、照明の使い方の説明がないうえ、空調のボタンの脇についている文字が小さくて高齢者には読めない。館内は冷房が効いているとは言え部屋着も分厚い生地で、真夏に着る衣類とはとても思えない。オールシーズン用なのかもしれないが、この辺にも客に対する思いやりが感じられない。
5.　事前に料金は払い込んであったので、チェックアウトの手続きが無かった。これはある意味では面倒がなく「楽」かも知れない。しかし、最後に客に対して感謝を表現する言葉なり、簡単なお礼の品なりの提供があっても良いのではないか？来た客に対する「ウェルカムラウンジ」があるのなら、帰る人たちにたいする同様のサービスがあってもよいのでは？
6.高齢者もいるのですよ。「書いてあるから読め」という姿勢にはうんざり。客に対して親切に説明・誘導するスタッフが（客数に比べて）絶対的に少ないのだと思います。全体の印象として客に対するサービス精神が著しく欠けています。１泊５万円も取るんですよ。そのことを理解しているのでしょうか？

reviews.title: 二度と泊まりません
reviews.positives: 竹生島に渡る船の港にとても近い
reviews.negatives:
チェックインの際にマッサージを頼んだら、部屋に行って自分で携帯で予約してくださいとの事。言われた通りQRコードを読み取るとフロントに電話して下さいと案内がありました。それならフロントでできたのでは？
マッサージの料金を支払おうとしても伝票がないからできない。いつでもフロントでって言われたんですけど？と言えば、じゃあ聞きましょうか？と答える始末。確認しますのでお待ちくださいと言えないのかな？各部署との連携もできていないし、フロントマンの対応も横柄で二度と泊まりたくないし、周りにもやめといた方がいいと言います。私が怒ったのを知っても何の対応もしてくれませんでした。あぐらかいた商売してます。

reviews.title: Satisfactory location and service provision
reviews.text: It is a 7-minute walk from Nagahama Station, and there is a shuttle service during the day. First of all, the hotel staff are friendly, and in the evening, there is a free sauna and unlimited drinks including highballs, spirits, and wine in the hall. It was great that I could drink as much beer as I wanted. Especially on the day of check-out, I went to a grocery store connected to the station, and to my surprise, the tofu noodles were 25% cheaper than at Don Quijote. I packed my trunk full and gifted them to all the staff, who were very happy~~~^^
reviews.response:
이번에는 그랜드 머큐어 비와코 리조트 & 스파를 이용해 주셔서 감사합니다.
나가하마역에서의 액세스나 셔틀 버스의 편리성, 그리고 스탭의 대응에 대해 칭찬의 말을 받고, 매우 기쁘게 배독했습니다.
저녁 식사 후 사우나에서 편안한 후, 부인과 함께 음료 무제한을 마음껏 즐길 수 있었다는 것, 여행의 즐거운 추억 만들기의 도움을 할 수 있었던 것을 영광으로 알고 있습니다.
또, 하이볼이나 위스키, 와인, 맥주 등, 취향에 맞는 음료를 만끽해 주신 모습에, 스탭 일동 대단히 격려되고 있습니다.
꼭 또 부부로, 계절을 바꾸어 나가하마에 와 주세요.
손님의 또 오는 것을, 스탭 일동심보다 기다리고 있습니다.
소중한 의견을 대단히 감사합니다.
그랜드 머큐어 비와코 리조트 & 스파
프론트 담당

reviews.positives: ロケーションがよく、駐車場も広く、利便性は高い。三世帯で宿泊して、楽しく過ごすことに向いているホテルと考えられます。しかし、ゆっくり滞在するには不向きな部分もあるように思いました。総じてファミリー向けのホテルと思います。
reviews.negatives:
2024年4月リブランドオープンと公式HPに記載されているが、正直、そのリニューアルされた部分は大浴場以外は実感できませんでした（リブランド前に宿泊したことがあるので、よく分かりました）。
部屋の内装は変更無し、ベッドも同じ（スプリングがへたっている？）、エレベーターの制御も悪い、部屋の照明も前時代的な蛍光灯のまま、などなど、せっかくの好ロケーションが勿体ない印象でした。ファミリー層向けのホテルでしょうから、このままでも一定の維持はできると思いますが、内装関係がかなり古くなっており、将来性は厳しい印象を受けました。

reviews.title: I can't believe there's even alcohol in the welcome drink!
reviews.text:
Welcome drink from the welcome ice bar/ even alcohol until 6 PM and a nightcap after dinner/ of course with alcohol (there was no beer but there was sake). 
And, and 
The breakfast buffet was so varied that there were too many items to try them all! 
Of course, the taste was also very delicious. 
There were even three types of smoothies. 

I want to stay again♪
There were many families with children, and it seems that there is a pool in the summer. 
There were both an indoor bath and an outdoor bath, and I really enjoyed it. 

Thank you very much!

reviews.title: Great relaxing place to stay.
reviews.text: Nice quiet hotel / resort in Nagayama. There is a bus shuttle service that runs from the station to the hotel every hour. Travellers with luggages can make use of this service, otherwise it's about a 8 minutes walk from the station to the hotel. The onsen is great and the hotel has free lounge access from 1500 - 1800 and 2100 - 0000. Alcoholic beverages are self served during this period. Pool is closed throughout the year other than summer. Just outside the hotel, there is a nice park for leisure strolls along the perimeter of the lake. One thing that can be improved would be the breakfast area. It can get quite congested and alot of movements. So it gives the feeling that everyone is finishing to eat during breakfast. There is also a laundry area to wash your clothes near the public bath. There are 2 table tennis tables, carrom to play too. Overall, it is a great and relaxing place to stay and will come back again.
reviews.response:
Thank you very much for your thoughtful and detailed review.

We're delighted to hear that you had a relaxing stay and enjoyed the peaceful atmosphere, convenient shuttle service, onsen facilities, and our complimentary lounge offerings. It's also great to know you had time to explore the lakeside park and take advantage of the leisure facilities like table tennis and carrom.

We also appreciate your feedback regarding the breakfast area. Your comments help us identify areas for improvement, and we will certainly look into enhancing the dining experience during peak hours.

We hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back for another peaceful and comfortable stay in the future.
Grand Mercure Lake Biwa
Front Staff

reviews.title: Amazing stay with beautiful lake biwa view
reviews.text:
Nagahama is a peaceful, beautiful town that truly reflects Japan’s culture of courtesy. Our stay at Grand Mecure was excellent! The staff were kind and attentive, even double-checking our Japanese-style room choice at check-in. We had a lovely lake view and enjoyed a generous alcohol buffet with beer, wine, liquor, and cocktails.

Although the walk to the train station was a bit far for us, the hotel thoughtfully provided free electric bicycle rentals, which made exploring the peaceful town so much easier. Truly great service, highly recommended!
reviews.response:
Thank you for staying at Grand Mercure Lake Biwa Resort & Spa.
We would also like to express our sincere gratitude for your kind words about the town of Nagahama and our hotel's services.
We are very happy to read that you enjoyed the peaceful and beautiful townscape of Nagahama and the politeness of Japan.
We are very honored to hear that you were satisfied with our staff's service, the confirmation of the Japanese-style room at check-in, the alcohol, and the view of Lake Biwa.
We are also very happy that you enjoyed exploring the town using an electric bicycle.
All of our staff will continue to work hard to provide you with a truly satisfying stay.
Thank you for your wonderful post.
We look forward to welcoming you again.
Thank you very much for your valuable feedback.
Grand Mercure Lake Biwa Resort & Spa

Alle unsere Mitarbeiter freuen sich darauf, Sie wieder begrüßen zu dürfen.

reviews.title: コスパ
reviews.positives: 研修生の札を付けた年配の方の対応が非常に良かったです
reviews.negatives: 洋室より値段がかなり高かった割に、和室なのに座椅子が無く、洗面台も汚かった。食事のバイキングも食べた後の皿等は、自分で片付けるシステムでした。メニューは朝の方が充実感はあるかな。宿泊人数の割には無くなった物の補充が遅く感じられた。有料マッサージチェアも無く、泊まった日はマッサージ室も休みだった。一泊二万近くする割にはおそまつかな。

reviews.title: もう行きません
reviews.text:
お部屋に入って、クローゼットをあけたら、前の宿泊客が使っていたベッドカバーがそのまま置いてありました。
夕食も高すぎます。
いくらお正月とはいえ、全く値段に見合ったお料理ではありませんでした。
修学旅行のようなお料理。
食事場所も写真とは、全く違っていて宴会場みたいなところで、がっかり、
お部屋も隣のうるさいのが丸聞こえ。
トイレを使う音も丸聞こえ。
チェックアウトの際のスタッフの方も偉そうな対応もいらっとして、最悪でした。
大事なお金をゴミ箱に捨てたような感じでした。
reviews.response:
この度は当ホテルをご利用いただき誠にありがとうございます。
せっかくご利用いただきましたのに不快な思いをさせてしまい誠に申し訳ございませんでした。
クローゼット内のベッドカバーとはソファーカバーでございまして、きれいにたたんで
クローゼット内に保管すべきところを、たたまずにそのままに置いてしまっていたものと思われます。
お食事につきまして、写真に載せています会場では収容が足らず、隣の会場にもお席を設け、
お食事ボードも置かせていただいております。設備上、メインとなるようなお料理がその会場では設置が難しい状況ですが、写真の会場に置いていますお料理も自由にお取りいただけるようにしております。
お客様のご指摘を真摯に受けとめ、隣の会場の料理ボードも工夫をし改善をいたしてまいります。
スタッフの対応につきましては、私共の教育不足でお恥ずかしい思いでございます。
改めてお詫び申し上げるとともに、今後このようなことないように努めてまりますので
次回ご利用いただける機会がございましたら、ぜひ挽回させていただきたくなにとぞよろしくお願い申し上げます。
グランドメルキュール琵琶湖リゾート＆スパ

スタッフの対応についても、迅速な解決をご提供できなかったことを重ねてお詫び申し上げます。
今後、こうした事態が再発しないよう、設備の点検強化とスタッフの対応改善に努めて参ります。
貴重なご意見をいただき、誠にありがとうございました。

reviews.title: 家族の思い出！
reviews.positives: 旅の雰囲気を味わえました！

reviews.title: 5星リゾートホテルにふさわしくないホテル
reviews.text:
アゴタでの好評価を見て宿泊を決めました。車で到着後、多めの荷物があったのでポーターに部屋まで運んでもらおうとしましたが、エントランスにホテルスタッフは一人もいなく、どうしたらいいのかわからず大変困りました。結局、エントランス前に車を駐車したままとなり、妻がチェックイン待ちの長蛇の列に並び確認したところ、ポーターがいないので空港にあるようなカート2台で私たちが部屋まで運搬するよう言われ大変驚きました！！さらに、その間は車をエントランス前に駐車したままで良いと言われさらに驚きました。部屋に荷物を置いてカートを取りに来て欲しいとフロントに電話で依頼したところ、元の場所に戻すよう言われ三度驚きました。このホテルにはサービスの概念が欠如していると思わざるを得ません。
部屋の中を見ると、改装されたスタンダードツインであったので一見きれいに見えましたが、バスルームを確認したところ、バスタブの外側カバーは外れかけており中から黒カビが多数付着していたので妻が気持ち悪いと拭き取りました。洗い場にも目地に黒カビが多数あり、清掃が行き届いていませんでした。清掃の前にバスタブが壊れていることに気づかないものでしょうか？
タオルの追加を依頼したところ、フロントに取りに来るよう言われたり等々、ホテルに泊まった側がホテルスタッフの代わりにさせらされたのは初めてでした。ホテルに泊まって寛ぐどころか大変疲れた滞在となりました。
ホテル自慢のラウンジを利用しましたが、利用者があまりにも多くて騒々しく、席の確保に困りました。ラウンジ内はスタッフがいなく、飲んだあとの紙コップを利用者が自ら捨てるため、テーブルが汚れたままで衛生面が気になりました。さらには、ラウンジの入室にあたってのチェックもなく、部外者が自由に出入りできる状態で防犯面でも気になりました。
このホテルは本当にリゾートホテルなのでしょうか？？？
reviews.response:
この度はグランドメルキュール琵琶湖リゾート＆スパにご宿泊いただき、誠にありがとうございました。
数あるホテルの中から当館をお選びいただいたにもかかわらず、ご到着時からご滞在中に至るまで、多大なるご不快とご不便をおかけしましたこと、心より深くお詫び申し上げます。

まず、お荷物の運搬や駐車場のご案内につきまして、十分なサポートができず、ご不安なお気持ちのままご自身でご対応いただく形となってしまいましたこと、大変申し訳ございませんでした。本来であれば、お客様に安心して快適にお過ごしいただけるよう配慮すべきところ、度重なるご不快な思いをおかけし、弁解の余地もございません。

また、お部屋の清掃不備につきましても、浴室内の黒カビや設備の不具合により、ご不快な思いをさせてしまいましたことを重ねてお詫び申し上げます。本来、清掃および設備点検の段階で気付くべき内容であり、管理体制の甘さを痛感しております。早急に清掃・点検体制の見直しと改善に努めてまいります。

さらに、追加タオルのお渡し方法につきましても、お客様への配慮を欠いた対応となってしまい、大変申し訳ございませんでした。「ホテルで寛ぐどころか疲れた滞在となった」とのお言葉を重く受け止めております。

ラウンジにつきましても、混雑や衛生面、運営体制、防犯面においてご不安を感じさせてしまいましたこと、誠に申し訳ございません。快適で安心してご利用いただける空間をご提供できなかったことを真摯に反省しております。

このたび頂戴しましたご指摘は、サービス・清掃・運営すべてに関わる重要な課題として共有し、改善に取り組んでまいります。

お忙しい中、貴重なご意見をお寄せいただき誠にありがとうございました。
グランドメルキュール琵琶湖リゾート＆スパ
フロント担当

reviews.negatives: 夕食の品数や質が以前と比べて驚くほど下がったと思います。昨年いただいて美味しかったローストビーフやスモークサーモン、バーガーや、子どもが楽しみにしていたキッズコーナー等が無くなっており、朝食も同様残念でした…ラウンジのワインも無くなった後補充されず…(タイミングが悪かったのかもしれません…)平日泊だからなのか、子どもの多いシーズンではないからなのか、物価高のためなのかわかりませんが、前回宿泊した時がとてもよかっただけに本当に本当に残念でした。宿泊費が上がってもいいので、せっかくのオールインクルーシブ、美味しい食事をいただきたい…他の場所の系列ホテルにも行ってみたいなと思っていたのですが、ちょっとどうしようかな…という感じです。

reviews.title: チェックイン
reviews.text:
チェックインして
部屋に入った際に電気がつかなかった
スタッフを呼ばせていただき到着時にようやく電気がつかない原因がわかったのが残念でした。少し遅めのチェックインになり疲れていたのでそこが残念でした。
またクローゼットに見知らぬ人のインナーが残っていた点についてもマイナス材料でした。
reviews.response:
この度はグランドメルキュール琵琶湖リゾート＆スパをご利用いただき、誠にありがとうございます。
チェックイン後すぐにお部屋にて度重なる不備があり、ご不快な思いをおかけしましたこと、心より深くお詫び申し上げます。

お部屋にお入りになられた際、照明が点灯せず、原因が判明するまでお時間を要してしまったこと、またお疲れのところスタッフをお呼びいただくお手間をおかけしましたこと、誠に申し訳ございませんでした。遅めのチェックインでご到着された中、本来はゆっくりお休みいただくべきところ、このような対応となってしまい、重ねてお詫び申し上げます。

さらに、クローゼット内に前のお客様の私物が残っていた件につきましては、本来決してあってはならないことであり、清掃および最終確認の不備と真摯に受け止めております。大変ご不快な思いをおかけしましたこと、重ねて深くお詫び申し上げます。

今回いただきましたご指摘は、清掃・点検体制の見直しとスタッフ間の確認強化を行い、再発防止に努めてまいります。
貴重なご意見をお寄せいただき、誠にありがとうございました。

誠に勝手ではございますが、また機会がございました際には、安心して快適にお過ごしいただけるご滞在をご提供できますよう、スタッフ一同尽力してまいります。

お客様にまたお越しいただける日を、スタッフ一同心よりお待ち申し上げております。
この度はありがとうございました。
グランドメルキュール琵琶湖リゾート＆スパ
フロント担当
reviews.room_type: Classic Room with 2 Single beds Lake View

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text:
部屋は広く、琵琶湖を眺めることもでき良かったです。
ただ、部屋数・人数に対し設備が十分でないかなと感じました。エレベーターの数が少なく、さらに部屋の階では今どの階にエレベーターがいるかの表示もないのでどれだけ待ったらいいか分からない、きたと思ったら満員で乗れない。
また各設備に営業時間が決められているのは分かるのですが、お風呂、ラウンジ、プレイスペース、全てにおいてあと1~2時間あれば違うのに、と利用させてもらうのに忙しなさを感じました。
バイキングは種類が豊富で嬉しかったですが、会場が2つに分かれていて自由に行き来できるものの、席によっては料理が遠い 笑 
設計上仕方ないのかな、と思いますが、メイン会場では無いほうにもカウンターを増やして、同じ種類の料理を置いていただけるともっと食事を楽しめたと思います。
繁忙期にはやめておこうかな…と感じました。
reviews.response:
この度はグランドメルキュール琵琶湖リゾート＆スパをご利用いただき、誠にありがとうございます。 
お部屋からの琵琶湖の眺望や、ビュッフェの豊富なメニューにご満足いただけたとのお言葉を頂戴し、大変嬉しく拝見いたしました。
お褒めいただきました点は、私どもにとって大きな励みとなります。
一方で、館内設備や導線においてご不便をおかけし、誠に申し訳ございませんでした。
特にエレベーターの混雑や、現在位置の表示がないことによる待ち時間の不透明さにつきましては、多くのお客様に快適にご利用いただけるよう改善を検討してまいります。
また、大浴場やラウンジ、プレイスペースの営業時間に関しても、お客様のご滞在リズムにより寄り添えるよう、今後の運用見直しの参考とさせていただきます。
バイキング会場につきましては、導線や距離によりご不便を感じられたとのこと、申し訳ございませんでした。
混雑緩和と料理へのアクセス向上のため、会場内の配置や料理提供方法についても改善の余地があると認識しております。
ご指摘の通り、繁忙期にはご利用が集中し、ご期待に十分お応えできない場面もございますが、それでも「また来たい」と思っていただける施設を目指し、スタッフ一同努めてまいります。
お客様のまたのお越しを、スタッフ一同心よりお待ちしております。 
貴重なご意見を誠にありがとうございました。
グランドメルキュール琵琶湖リゾート＆スパ 
フロント担当

せっかくのご滞在にもかかわらず、ご期待に沿う静かな環境をご提供できなかったことを心よりお詫び申し上げます。

reviews.title: 部屋や温泉良かったです
reviews.text:
3連休の初日だったので、混み合っていました、お部屋やお風呂はとても良かったです。ただお風呂でのスタッフの対応には残念な気持ちになりました。23時終了で、お風呂は行ったのが22時半。30分はありましたが、行った時点でスタッフにもう入れないかのような対応をされました。23時終了と納得して入ると、今度は23時10分前から片付けをし出し、出て行けと言わんばかりでした。まだ23時になっていないのに…
ラウンジでのドリンク提供も期待ハズレでした。夜の部ではビールもスパークリングワインも提供が無く、昼の部だけと張り紙がありました。そのような説明が無く飲めるものと思っていただけに非常に残念でした。

一方で、大浴場ご利用時のスタッフの対応により、ご不快な思いをおかけしましたこと、誠に申し訳ございません。
営業時間内であるにもかかわらず、ご入浴を急かすような対応や片付けの開始により、ゆっくりお過ごしいただけなかったことは、本来あってはならないことであり、深くお詫び申し上げます。該当部署へ共有のうえ、時間内は安心してご利用いただけるよう、接遇および運用の見直しを徹底してまいります。

また、ラウンジのドリンク提供につきましても、事前のご案内が不足しており、ご期待に添えなかったことを重ねてお詫び申し上げます。
提供時間や内容について、より分かりやすいご案内方法の改善に努めてまいります。

せっかくのご滞在にもかかわらず、サービス面において残念なお気持ちにさせてしまいましたことを真摯に受け止め、今後の改善に活かしてまいります。

のんびり滞在するなら、ケチらず高い部屋にするのをおすすめします！

reviews.title: 誕生日に利用して
reviews.text: 今回初めて宿泊したのですが、ラウンジサービスや朝食の内容などは申し分なかったのですが、ただ一点だけ朝食に関してですが8時過ぎに会場に行ったのですがその時にはもうすでにどこも長蛇の列、座るところもどこにしようかと思うくらいの混みようで、少し離れた宴会場で食べる事にしました。並んで食事を取りに行き席に着いてどれも美味しくいただきました。が、人が多いために何を取る場合も並んで。。。と言う感じでした。やっと少し空いて来たかなあ？と思うや否や9時半に撤去しますとの事。確かにまだ冬休み中という事もあり子供も多く一時期は会場もごった返してたと言う感想です。宿泊人数によって朝食の時間はある程度の予約制にするとか、もう少し時間を延長するとかにされたらどうかと思います。とにかく子供が多くてこの時期に宿泊した事をとても後悔しました。
reviews.response:
この度はご利用いただき、誕生日という特別な日に当ホテルをお選びいただき、誠にありがとうございます。ラウンジサービスや朝食の内容にご満足いただけたとのこと、大変嬉しく思います。
一方で朝食の時間帯の混雑に関しましては、ご不便をおかけしてしまい大変申し訳ございませんでした。
特に冬休み期間中の混雑は予想以上だったかと思われます。お客様のご意見の通り、宿泊人数に応じて朝食時間の調整や、予約制の導入、時間延長などを検討することで、より快適にお過ごしいただけるよう改善を図ってまいります。
今後はさらなる配慮をしていきたいと考えております。
貴重なご意見をいただきありがとうございました。もしまた機会があれば、当ホテルをご利用いただければ幸いでございます。
お客様にまたお越しいただける日を、スタッフ一同心よりお待ち申し上げております。
貴重なご意見を誠にありがとうございました。

reviews.title: リーズナブル
reviews.text:
ウェルカムドリンクがチェックイン後に楽しめます。フリードリンクでソフトドリンク以外にもビール、酎ハイが楽しめます。おつまみも地元のピーナッツせんべいがあり、ラムネやグミ、柿のタネなどあり、お子様も楽しめると思います。21時から23時の間はナイトキャップタイムになり、おつまみは変わりませんが、フリードリンクにアルコールの種類が増えます。フレッシュなハーブやフルーツを漬けこんだブランデーやジンもあり、特にジン・ライムが美味しかったです。残念なのは、ウェルカムドリンクタイムにはあったビールがなく、地酒が無いこと。
売店があり、アルコール、地酒が販売されていますが、開店時間が16時30から21時までなのでナイトキャップタイムにビールが飲みたければ自身で準備しておいたほうが良いです。
reviews.response:
先日はグランドメルキュール琵琶湖リゾート＆スパをご利用いただき、誠にありがとうございます。
ウェルカムドリンクやナイトキャップタイムをお楽しみいただけたようで、大変嬉しく思います。ジン・ライムがお気に召していただけたとのこと、特にフレッシュなハーブやフルーツを使用したドリンクがご満足いただけたことに喜びを感じております。一方で、ビールや地酒についてのご指摘をいただき、ありがとうございます。お客様のご意見を参考にし、サービスの向上を目指してまいります。今後、ビールや地酒を多くの方にお楽しみいただけるよう検討いたします。
今後も皆様からいただくご意見・ご感想を参考に、より良いホテルづくりにスタッフ一同努力を重ねて参ります。
お客様のまたのお越しを、スタッフ一同心よりお待ち申し上げております。
貴重なご意見を誠にありがとうございました。

サイトでは，喫煙OKで､ホテルからの回答も宿泊前々日迄はOKだったのに､前日にノーの返事が有り、キャンセできなかった。

reviews.title: レイクビュー最高です
reviews.text:
ホテルはかなり古く、部屋にはコンセントも少ないなど、いろいろ言いたいことはありますが、古いなりに部屋の綺麗さは保たれてます。
ビジネスホテルではないので、部屋の冷蔵庫にミネラルウォーターのペットボトルはないので、各階にあるウォーターサーバーに水を汲みに行かないと行けません。
駐車場は宿泊の場合、1日500円で停めれますし、1日の間なら駐車場の出入りは何度でもできます。
1階に大浴場がありますが、普通のお風呂です。
露天風呂は温泉成分が入っているようですが、源泉掛け流しではなく、循環式のようです。
サウナと水風呂がありますが、どちらも温度設定は極端に暑すぎず、冷たすぎずなので、何度でも入れます。
1階に卓球台が2台あり、自由に遊べますが、宿泊客が多いので、なかなか使用できないです。(1組15分との表示あり)
宿泊したのは9階のレイクビューで、夜は真っ暗で外は何も見えませんが、朝は琵琶湖と長浜城がよく見えて、景色は素晴らしかったです。
今回は素泊まりだったので、ホテルのビュッフェは知りませんが、評価は悪くないようです。
1階のラウンジでは、ビール等のアルコール類、ソフトドリンク、コーヒー等が飲み放題で、おつまみなどもフリーでしたが、21時からの夜の部ではビールサーバが使えず、ビールが飲めなかったのは、少し残念です。
reviews.response:
この度はグランドメルキュール琵琶湖リゾート＆スパをご利用いただき、誠にありがとうございます。 
お部屋のコンセントの数や設備面において、ご不便をおかけし申し訳ございませんでした。
施設の構造上すぐの改善が難しい点もございますが、可能な範囲での見直しや延長コードの貸出等で対応してまいります。
また、ラウンジのドリンクサービスや卓球コーナーに関してもご利用いただきありがとうございます。
卓球の混雑や、夜間のビールサーバーの使用不可など、快適にお過ごしいただけなかった点につきましては、今後改善を検討してまいります。
レイクビューのお部屋からの朝の眺めにご満足いただけたようで何よりでございます。
琵琶湖と長浜城の景色は当ホテルの自慢のひとつであり、ご堪能いただけたとのお言葉はスタッフ一同の励みになります。
今回は素泊まりでのご利用とのことでしたが、ぜひ次回はビュッフェもお試しいただけますと幸いです。
お客様のまたのお越しを、スタッフ一同心よりお待ちしております。 
貴重なご意見を誠にありがとうございました。

翌日の朝食は良かったですが、想像するに、古いホテルを買い取って１階と2階だけきれいにしました！という感じですね。
部屋のリノベーションが必要と思いました。

伊勢志摩はグラスだったので残念です。
ツマミももう少し良いバリエーションを
期待します。
reviews.response:

また、伊勢志摩の施設と比較されてのご感想も含め、真摯に受け止めております。

紙コップの使用につきましては、運用面や安全面を考慮しての対応ではございますが、いただいたご意見の通り、雰囲気や満足度の向上という観点において重要な課題であると認識しております。
今後のサービス改善の参考として検討させていただきます。

さらに、おつまみのバリエーションにつきましても、ご期待にお応えできるよう内容の充実を図ってまいります。

今後も皆さまによりご満足いただける空間とサービスをご提供できますよう努めてまいりますので、また機会がございましたらぜひお越しいただけますと幸いでございます。

改めまして、この度のご宿泊と率直なご意見、誠にありがとうございました。

reviews.title: まあまあよかった方かなあ？
reviews.positives: 観光船乗り場が近かった。琵琶湖やお城が近いので、散歩するだけでも楽しい。駐車場に１日駐めておけるのもよかった。浴場の洗い場の数が多く、人がいてもあまり混雑を感じなかった。ラウンジでの飲み物の無料提供がありがたかった。
reviews.negatives: スマホで混雑状況を確認して、そんなに混雑していないと思って行ったのだが、会場が思った以上に広いため、あんまり意味がなかった。料理から遠い席になってしまい、取りに行くのが面倒だった。料理の種類はたくさんあったし、見た目もよかったが、味が今ひとつだったので、満足度は低い。

reviews.title: 朝から晩までお酒が飲み放題！
reviews.text:
まずラウンジが無料で利用できる点が良かった。お酒も種類が豊富で、自分で作るスタイルなので濃さも調整できる。つまみは柿の種、バターピーナッツ、プレッツェルなど、必要最低限は揃ってるので自分には十分だった。もちろんソフトドリンクも飲み放題で、某ファミレスと同じドリンクマシーンなので種類も豊富で子供でも楽しめる。
部屋はリニューアルしたそうだが、泊まったのは古いタイプの和室。泊まるだけなら特に問題はなかったが、欲を言えば背もたれのある座椅子がほしい、洗面所の蛇口が奥にありすぎて手が洗いづらい、などが気になった。ただ、ほとんど部屋は寝るだけの場所で、基本はラウンジや食事や温泉で外に出ていることが多いので、部屋のサービスは二の次に感じられる。
温泉は広くて平日だったからかゆっくり入れた。女性側と男性側でアメニティが異なると聞き、男性側にも化粧水や乳液を常備していただけるとありがたい。温泉前のロビーにもドリンクコーナーや休憩コーナーがあり、時間を忘れてゆっくりすることができる。
立地は長浜駅からすぐで、シャトルバスも運行している。観光地の黒壁スクエアにも頑張れば歩いていける。
reviews.response:
先日はグランドメルキュール琵琶湖リゾート＆スパをご利用いただき、誠にありがとうございます。
ラウンジのご利用についてご満足いただけたこと、お酒の種類やご自身で作るスタイルをお楽しみいただけたこと大変嬉しく思っております。おつまみやソフトドリンクもお楽しみいただけたご様子で嬉しい限りです。背もたれのある座椅子や洗面所の蛇口の配置については、今後の改善点として参考にさせていただきます。
設備に関しまして経年劣化に驚かれた部分も多々あったことと存じます。リニューアル等すぐには難しい問題もございますが、古さを感じさせぬよう日々のこまめな清掃で館内を清潔に維持して参りたいと存じます。
露天風呂は空気に触れるとしだいに酸化し錆色になるという特長を持っている「長浜太閤温泉」で、良く温まるとのお言葉を頂戴しております。
ゆったりとお寛ぎいただけたご様子で安堵しております。
男性側のアメニティについてのご意見も頂戴し、今後のサービス向上に役立ててまいります。立地についても、長浜駅や観光地へのアクセスの良さをご評価いただき、誠にありがとうございます。
今後も皆様からいただくご意見・ご感想を参考に、より良いホテルづくりにスタッフ一同努力を重ねて参ります。
お客様のまたのお越しを、スタッフ一同心よりお待ちしております。
貴重なご意見を誠にありがとうございました。
